mapper.select: SELECT po.id, po.po_id, po.supplier_id, po.order_date, po.status, po.item, s.supplier_name, co.customer_name, (SELECT SUM(poi.quantity) FROM purchase_order_items poi WHERE poi.po_id = po.po_id) AS total_quantity FROM purchase_orders po LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON po.supplier_id = s.supplier_id LEFT JOIN customer_orders co ON po.po_id LIKE CONCAT('%', co.order_no) ORDER BY po.order_date DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_orders po LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON po.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
(s.supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR po.po_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR po.status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT po.id, po.po_id, po.supplier_id, po.order_date, po.status, po.item, s.supplier_name, co.customer_name FROM purchase_orders po LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON po.supplier_id = s.supplier_id LEFT JOIN customer_orders co ON po.po_id LIKE CONCAT('%', co.order_no) WHERE po.po_id = #{poCode}
SELECT id, po_id, supplier_id, order_date, status FROM purchase_orders WHERE id = #{poId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchase_orders (po_id, supplier_id, order_date, status, item) VALUES (#{poCode}, #{supplierId}, #{orderDate}, #{status}, #{item})
mapper.update: UPDATE purchase_orders SET status = 'CANCELLED' WHERE po_id LIKE CONCAT('PO-PARTS-', #{workOrderId}, '-%') AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT po.id, po.po_id, po.supplier_id, po.order_date, po.status, po.item, s.supplier_name, (SELECT SUM(poi.quantity) FROM purchase_order_items poi WHERE poi.po_id = po.po_id) AS total_quantity FROM purchase_orders po LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON po.supplier_id = s.supplier_id WHERE po.po_id LIKE CONCAT('PO-PARTS-', #{workOrderId}, '-%') ORDER BY po.order_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE purchase_orders SET supplier_id = #{supplierId} WHERE id = #{poId}
UPDATE purchase_orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{poId}
UPDATE purchase_order_items SET unit_price = #{unitPrice} WHERE po_item_id = #{poItemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchase_order_items (po_id, product_id, quantity, unit_price) VALUES (#{poId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT poi.po_item_id, poi.po_id, poi.product_id, poi.quantity, poi.unit_price, p.product_name FROM purchase_order_items poi LEFT JOIN products p ON poi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE poi.po_id = #{poCode}
SELECT supplier_id FROM supplier_products WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY is_primary DESC, supplier_id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.cost_price FROM supplier_products sp JOIN products p ON sp.product_id = p.product_id WHERE sp.supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY p.product_name
